added: Shared mission lifecycle transition map in src/missions/domain/missionLifecycle.ts
modified: Mission service lifecycle commands now validate transitions through the shared domain transition guard
fixed: Removed duplicated per-handler mission transition validation logic while preserving 409 invalid-transition semantics and audit-safe rejection behavior

notes: Validated duplicate approve rejection returns 409 and appends no second mission.approved event
Validated approve before submit returns 409 and appends no mission.approved event
Validated complete before launch returns 409 and appends no mission.completed event
Validated launch before approve returns 409 and appends no mission.launched event
Validated approve after active returns 409 and appends no mission.approved event
Validated submit after approved returns 409 and appends no mission.submitted event
Validated submit after completed returns 409 and appends no mission.submitted event
Validated complete after aborted returns 409 and appends no mission.completed event
Validated rejected lifecycle transitions leave mission event counts and mission state unchanged

nextBuildStep: Add a read-only mission lifecycle transition helper or endpoint for preflight validation and UI/domain reuse, while keeping the shared mission transition map as the single source of truth.

orderingRules: Replay -> Compliance -> Prediction -> Risk -> Advisory -> HUD
doNotChangeRules.compatibilityRule: Do not break existing replay, compliance, or airspace logic without a defined migration path
